member.name: T:OT.Assessment.App.Controllers.PlayerController
member.summary: Controller for handling player casino wager operations

member.name: M:OT.Assessment.App.Controllers.PlayerController.CasinoWager(OT.Assessment.Shared.DTOs.CasinoWagerDto)
member.summary: Receives player casino wager events and publishes them to RabbitMQ queue

member.name: M:OT.Assessment.App.Controllers.PlayerController.GetPlayerCasinoWagers(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of the latest casino wagers for a specific player

member.name: M:OT.Assessment.App.Controllers.PlayerController.GetTopSpenders(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the top spending players based on total spending amount
member.param: Number of top spenders to return (default: 10)
